input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.3.4
            TITLE: cannot measure fuel/energy used

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.3.4: Cannot Measure Fuel/Energy Used
D.13.3.4 Cannot Measure Fuel/Energy Used 
The vehicle will receive zero points

final_answer: rule D.13.3.4: Cannot Measure Fuel/Energy Used D.13.3.4 Cannot Measure Fuel/Energy Used The vehicle will receive zero points
